git.commit_message: feat: improve analysis skill eval quality

publish.command: NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=http://bnpm.byted.org npx -y agentbuddy@latest skill publish ./human_review_ops/skills/analysis --group skills.byted.org/lizhongtao/hunman_review_ops --access restricted --region cn -y

publish_verification.command: NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=http://bnpm.byted.org npx -y agentbuddy@latest skill find analyzing-ops-metrics

dynamic_eval.blocked_reason: Could not inspect or operate the current Chrome AgentBuddy eval page through Computer Use. The first get_app_state call for Google Chrome failed with app-level approval timeout: 'The app-level approval request for "Google Chrome" failed: Request timed out. This is NOT a system permission issue.' A second get_app_state retry was cancelled because the user requested immediate status and no further waiting.
attempted_paths: Loaded the Computer Use workflow instructions.
Read MCP tool descriptors for list_apps, get_app_state, click, type_text, and press_key.
Called list_apps and confirmed Google Chrome was running.
Called get_app_state for com.google.Chrome; it timed out at the app-level approval request.
Retried get_app_state for com.google.Chrome; the call was interrupted by the user's immediate status request.
Did not fabricate an eval task link or status.
